name: Fishfilet on Cabbage Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the fish and dry with paper towel. Sprinkle with two tablespoons of lemon juice.
2. Clean the cabbage and cut into thin strips. Blanch the cabbage in boiling saltwater for a few minutes, then place in a colander and let drain.
3. Wash the thyme bunch and remove the leaves, discarding the stems.
4. Clean and core the peppers; slice into small strips.
5. Mix remaining lemon juice with salt and pepper. Beat in olive oil and add thyme leaves.
6. Combine cabbage and peppers with the marinade and arrange on a platter.
7. Cut fish into thin strips, roll in flour, and fry in butter until golden brown. Serve warm over the cabbage salad.
